rows.label: tev000394_MSG0001
rows.name: Ah, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0002
rows.name:
I was just doing some target practice.
We may be Blue Bloods, but our skills
still weaken if we don't stay in shape.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_JNK0010
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: tev000394_SEL0011
rows.name:
Suggest Lao give Shingo
some firearms training.

rows.label: tev000394_JNK0020
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev000394_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Lao why he hasn't
been around much lately.

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0003
rows.name:
I'm sure there are lots of things I
could teach Shingo that'd give me a
chance to sharpen my own skills.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0004
rows.name:
But honestly, I don't have
that kind of time right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0005
rows.name:
And besides, his fighting style and mine
are just too different. He'd benefit more
from being trained by a specialist.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0006
rows.name:
Though I bet that sounds like I'm
just making excuses, doesn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0007
rows.name:
Everyone's got something
they're supposed to be doing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0008
rows.name:
Tell me, when you go on a mission that you know
will put lives at risk, do you bring Lin and
Tatsu along? Or do you leave them behind?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0009
rows.name:
I might be able to use your
experience to guide my own decision.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0010
rows.name:
I can't tell you all the details,
but I've got that hanging over
me just like you and Elma do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_JNK0030
rows.name: Refute

rows.label: tev000394_SEL0031
rows.name:
Stress the importance of
caring for your team.

rows.label: tev000394_JNK0040
rows.name: Reaffirm

rows.label: tev000394_SEL0041
rows.name: Show Lao your support.

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0011
rows.name: Huh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0012
rows.name: Doug said the exact same thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0013
rows.name:
Look, I get it. Saiden, Mondo, and
Shingo... They're dear friends to
me, and I trust them completely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0014
rows.name: I'd never take them for granted.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0015
rows.name:
Maybe I haven't made that very
clear. I'll try to tell them a
little more about what's going on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0016
rows.name: ...There. Are you happy now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0017
rows.name:
If you're satisfied that you've
meddled enough in my business for
one day, I have to be going.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0018
rows.name: It's almost time for me to meet Saiden.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0019
rows.name: Catch you later.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0020
rows.name:
No more questions? You're not
gonna pump me for details?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0021
rows.name:
Thanks for that, [ST:playername ]. Your
trust means a lot to me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0022
rows.name:
Listen, if you get a chance, could you
give Shingo a hand with his training?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0023
rows.name:
I know he'd be excited to work with someone
as skilled as you, and I'm sure there are
plenty of things you could teach him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000394_MSG0024
rows.name: Thanks. I appreciate it.[ST:wait ]
